Home Make a Submission?

Everything Bagel

Mary Germick

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 8 oz. cream cheese
  • 8 oz. sour cream
  • 3 tsp. Everything Bagel spice (from Aldi’s or Trader Joe’s)

Directions

Mix together and serve with Pretzel crackers or raw veggies. YUM!
